---
title: "Portfolio 10"
author: "Cynthia Deng"
date: "03/15/2026"
---
# PhD Program Application Scraper

See Jupyter Notebook:
https://dengq25.github.io/Portfolio/p10/scripts/p10.html

> **Note:** When I ran this notebook locally, the file paths were set to my local Downloads folder. For this portfolio submission, I have updated the paths to reflect the repository structure (../data/). I have not been able to re-run the notebook after pushing to GitHub to confirm the paths work as written. If you are cloning this repo and running it yourself, the notebook should work as long as you run it from p10/scripts/ with the data file in p10/data/. If you encounter a file not found error, check that your working directory is set to p10/scripts/.
